docs.title: API

docs.text: Architecture InfraRisk AI uses a small local stack for submission: api_server.py exposes FastAPI endpoints p5_streamlit_app.py provides the dashboard and simulation UI final_engine.py handles portfolio, export, and scoring logic data/processed/infrarisk.db stores lightweight persistence Runtime Flow Streamlit loads the dashboard. Users trigger simulation or portfolio actions. The API serves reusable portfolio and export endpoints. Results are written to the local SQLite store when needed.

docs.title: Runtime Flow

docs.text: Credit Memo 1 Project: InfraRisk AI Summary: A modular infrastructure risk platform that combines project finance analytics, portfolio stress testing, and simulation. Key Points: Lightweight deployment Reusable portfolio engine Streamlit dashboard for decision support FastAPI layer for programmatic access Decision: Suitable for internal review and iteration.
docs.title: Credit Memo 1

docs.title: Credit Memo 1

docs.text: Credit Memo 2 Project: InfraRisk AI Summary: Submission package focusing on reproducibility, documentation, and low-friction runtime setup. Key Points: Single Dockerfile for both API and UI Minimal dependencies for faster startup Three EDA notebooks included Submission docs generated in MkDocs format Decision: Ready for handoff review.
